name: fastlink
description: FastLink — page snapshots, clicks, console/network capture, and batch automation via a paired Chrome extension

tools.name: fast_scout
tools.description: PREFERRED way to understand and act on the active tab — use this instead of fast_snapshot in most cases.

tools.name: fast_point
tools.description: VISION coordinate-grounding: locate on-screen target(s) NOT in the DOM (opaque/cross-origin iframes, canvas, custom widgets) by having a fast multimodal mode...

tools.name: fast_vision_capture
tools.description: Low-level: capture the visible tab for the vision tier — returns {dataUrl, imgW, imgH, dpr}, optionally cropped to a CSS-px region and upscaled (the crop-zoo...

tools.name: fast_point_som
tools.description: VISION locate via SET-OF-MARK (classification, not coordinate regression — typically most reliable for dense/iframe forms).

tools.name: fast_fill_vision
tools.description: VISION form-fill in ONE call: fills an entire form server-side, collapsing the per-field point→click→type loop (~15 round-trips) into a single tool call.

tools.name: fast_do
tools.description: EXPERIMENTAL most-aggressive tier: give ONE plain-language INTENT and a whole form is filled/operated in a SINGLE call — a fast multimodal model (Gemini) doe...

tools.name: fast_locate
tools.description: Locate an element by racing the DOM and vision tiers concurrently; returns the fastest usable hit.

tools.name: fast_annotate_boxes
tools.description: Low-level: capture the viewport and draw numbered red boxes at the given CSS-px boxes [{n,x,y,w,h}], returning {dataUrl,dpr}.

tools.name: fast_status
tools.description: Report whether the Chrome extension is connected to this MCP server, and connection diagnostics.

tools.name: fast_prewarm
tools.description: Turn ON background pre-warming for the next ~60s.

tools.name: fast_snapshot
tools.description: Snapshot of the active Chrome tab.

tools.name: fast_click
tools.description: Click an element matching text/label/aria-label/placeholder.

tools.name: fast_fill
tools.description: Fill input/textarea/contenteditable by label/placeholder/name.

tools.name: fast_tab
tools.description: Open a new Chrome tab at the given URL.

tools.name: fast_nav
tools.description: Navigate the active Chrome tab to a URL.

tools.name: fast_reload
tools.description: Reload the active Chrome tab (bypassing cache) and wait for the load to finish.

tools.name: fast_list
tools.description: List all open tabs in the current Chrome window with id, url, title, and active state.

tools.name: fast_switch
tools.description: Switch focus to a specific Chrome tab.

tools.name: fast_wait
tools.description: Wait for the page to reach a state.

tools.name: fast_evaluate
tools.description: Escape hatch: run arbitrary JavaScript in the active Chrome tab (MAIN world, full DOM access).

tools.name: fast_text
tools.description: Read text (or HTML) from the active Chrome tab.

tools.name: fast_select_option
tools.description: Pick an option from a dropdown/combobox/select.

tools.name: fast_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the active Chrome tab.

tools.name: fast_marks
tools.description: Annotated screenshot: draws numbered boxes (the element's id) over visible interactive elements and returns the image + an id→center-coords map, for visually...

tools.name: fast_key_press
tools.description: Press a single key on the active tab.

tools.name: fast_key
tools.description: Trusted keyboard chord via the CDP Input domain — fires REAL key events with modifiers, so shortcuts like Ctrl+A, Cmd+C, Cmd+V, Shift+Tab actually work (unli...

tools.name: fast_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the active tab.

tools.name: fast_close
tools.description: Close a Chrome tab by id (from fast_list) or by URL/title substring match.

tools.name: fast_batch
tools.description: Run multiple FastLink actions in sequence with ONE tool call.

tools.name: fast_console
tools.description: Read recent console messages (log/warn/error/info) from the active Chrome tab.

tools.name: fast_network
tools.description: List recent network requests from the active Chrome tab (URL, method, status, type, duration).

tools.name: fast_hover
tools.description: Hover over an element matching text/label/aria-label/placeholder.

tools.name: fast_drag
tools.description: Drag from one element to another (or to coordinates).

tools.name: fast_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple fields in one call (saves N round-trips for large forms).

tools.name: fast_network_replay
tools.description: Re-fire a request from the active tab's page context, so the page's cookies/auth are sent automatically (no manual header copy).

tools.name: fast_macro_save
tools.description: Save a named multi-step recipe (e.g.

tools.name: fast_macro_list
tools.description: List all saved macros (name, step count, description, savedAt).

tools.name: fast_macro_run
tools.description: Run a previously saved macro by name.

tools.name: fast_macro_delete
tools.description: Delete a saved macro by name.

tools.name: fast_click_xy
tools.description: Trusted click at a pixel via the CDP Input domain (a REAL mouse event, isTrusted:true) — unlike fast_click's injected JS, LWC/React widgets honor it and it c...

tools.name: fast_wheel
tools.description: Trusted mouse-wheel scroll at a point via the CDP Input domain — a REAL wheel event, so canvas/WebGL views and virtualized lists that ignore programmatic scr...

tools.name: fast_drag_xy
tools.description: Trusted drag via the CDP Input domain — real mousePressed → mouseMoved(s) → mouseReleased, so native HTML5 drag-and-drop, sliders, and sortable lists that ig...

tools.name: fast_type
tools.description: Trusted typing into whatever element currently has focus, via CDP Input.insertText — React/LWC accept it because it's a real input event (unlike setting .val...
